item.title: Building freedom, one board at a time
item.description: There is something deeply satisfying about building with your own hands — and this video captures that feeling perfectly. One board, one step, one dream at a time. What are you building toward?

media:content.media:title: Building freedom, one board at a time
media:content.media:description: There is something deeply satisfying about building with your own hands — and this video captures that feeling perfectly. One board, one step, one dream at a time. What are you building toward?

item.title: Complete Inside and Outside Renovation of a Junked‑Out Tiny Home
item.description: From wreck to wonder, this tiny home gets a full transformation. What does it take to turn a junked‑out shell into a livable space?

media:content.media:title: Complete Inside and Outside Renovation of a Junked‑Out Tiny Home
media:content.media:description: From wreck to wonder, this tiny home gets a full transformation. What does it take to turn a junked‑out shell into a livable space?

item.title: We Got Fired in the Middle of a Job — $15,000 Gone
item.description: One moment we’re working, the next we’re out. What happened on this job site that cost us $15,000 and left us stunned?

media:content.media:title: We Got Fired in the Middle of a Job — $15,000 Gone
media:content.media:description: One moment we’re working, the next we’re out. What happened on this job site that cost us $15,000 and left us stunned?

item.title: Let’s Replace Hurricane Ties — Quicker & Easier
item.description: Strong connections make all the difference. What’s the faster, smarter way to replace hurricane ties and keep your build secure?

item.title: Not Good Enough... Learning From Our Mistakes
item.description: Every project has setbacks, but mistakes bring lessons. What went wrong, and how did it make the team stronger?

item.title: We've got a Roof!

item.title: Why a Speed Square Should Be the NUMBER ONE Go‑To Tool in Your Kit

item.title: The Best Way to Measure Rafters
item.description: Precision matters when framing a roof. What’s the smartest method to measure rafters and avoid costly mistakes?
